title: Lithuania — Application to Register an Individuali Įmonė (Sole Proprietorship) in the Register of Legal Entities (JAR-1 + JAR-S + JAR-VO-V + JAR-T + KD-1)
description:
The State Enterprise Centre of Registers' (Valstybės įmonė Registrų centras) standard "Prašymas registruoti Juridinių asmenų registre" (Application to Register in the Register of Legal Entities, form JAR-1), scoped in this document exclusively to the 'individuali įmonė' (sole proprietorship) legal form checkbox — one of roughly 27 legal-form options JAR-1's own printed structure supports. JAR-1's own section 5 instructs that an individuali įmonė filing must be accompanied by four companion forms — JAR-VO-V (single-member management body), JAR-S (owner data, itself footnoted 'Pildoma individualioms įmonėms' — completed for sole proprietorships), JAR-T (the rule by which persons act on the entity's behalf), and KD-1 (contact information) — and this document models the composite of all five as one filing, following this registry's established pattern (e.g. sk/okresny-urad/ohlasenie-zivnosti-fyzicka-osoba, si/ajpes's sole-proprietor schema) of embedding companion forms as sections of a single schema document rather than as separate documents. Opens Lithuania's Business Formation vertical (1 of 6; Lithuania previously covered only Taxes, via lt/vmi's GPM311/GPM311C schemas from GOV-2969/GOV-2982).

Models JAR-1's registered-office address, legal-form selection, financial-year and limited-activity-period data, founding-document date, the single-member-management-body governing-organ checkbox, the free-form attached-documents list, the four companion forms' own printed page-count grid, VAT-payer registration intent, notary-filing indicator, and the filer's own signature/contact block (Parts 1-14 plus the unlabelled contact-details block); JAR-S's owner identity and residence data; JAR-VO-V's single-member management body's identity, residence, and appointment-start data; JAR-T's single representation-rule choice; and KD-1's entity contact data, filer signature, and optional GDPR data-processing consent. A prior scouting cycle (GOV-2995) located JAR-VO-V, JAR-S, and KD-1 via Wayback Machine capture after the live registrucentras.lt site 403'd direct fetches (Cloudflare bot-challenge) and flagged JAR-T — printed as mandatory in JAR-1's own section 5 instruction for individuali įmonė — as not located. This document independently re-fetched all four of those forms this cycle (GOV-3000) and also located JAR-T itself via the same Wayback Machine technique, so all five forms in the individuali įmonė filing set are modelled; no un-located companion form remains. Full scoping decisions, page-by-page field tallies, and every disclosed judgment call are in this document's own VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Lithuania, the Ministry of Economy and Innovation, or Valstybės įmonė Registrų centras.

authority.name: Valstybės įmonė Registrų centras (State Enterprise Centre of Registers)

operatedBy.name: Lietuvos Respublikos ekonomikos ir inovacijų ministerija (Ministry of Economy and Innovation of the Republic of Lithuania)
operatedBy.basis: VĮ Registrų centras is a state enterprise (valstybės įmonė) wholly owned by the Republic of Lithuania; the Government of the Republic of Lithuania designated the Ministry of Economy and Innovation as the institution implementing the state's owner rights and obligations over VĮ Registrų centras from 2019 onward (previously the Ministry of Transport and Communications, 2017-2019), independently confirmed this cycle via web search. VĮ Registrų centras itself is the statutory registrar (registro tvarkytojas) of the Register of Legal Entities (Juridinių asmenų registras) under the Juridinių asmenų registro nuostatai approved by Government resolution, and its own director issues the JAR-series form templates modelled in this document, per each form's own printed 'generalinio direktoriaus įsakymu' header.

source.documentRef: JAR-1 (main application) + JAR-S (owner data) + JAR-VO-V (single-member management body) + JAR-T (representation rule) + KD-1 (contact information), individuali įmonė filing set per JAR-1 section 5

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3000 (child of GOV-2995), opening Lithuania's Business Formation vertical (1 of 6). Independently re-fetched all five source PDFs this cycle via Wayback Machine capture (registrucentras.lt returns HTTP 403, Cloudflare bot-challenge, on direct fetch), not trusted from the prior scouting cycle's own figures as-is: JAR-1 (352,968 bytes, sha256 8eb399a1d842e5ff7e5df450f7714b10006b1152ee74f9393fbfde7605a93f86, 2025-11-08 capture), JAR-VO-V (216,327 bytes, sha256 fb8129ffa2ba14dc14dea172626363f12629712ef9b24ac14c0ac281c3e56829, 2025-11-08 capture), JAR-S (106,182 bytes, sha256 3bb5e1d876ad351d406891170d2e5fcf11b9ed1de7a9cbfccaf95d88ef7b0bb9, 2024-06-25 capture), KD-1 (173,756 bytes, sha256 31d8b935b2b4fa481eb2ba7e9b223665d74448b4c2cabe8165660aa3c7d8690c, 2024-03-08 capture), and JAR-T (185,005 bytes, sha256 9854ca875f5c5fbd41fdd025eaed0ea16b79ebf2987fd611fc4dda26c3fe75bd, 2025-11-08 capture) — the last of which the prior scouting cycle did not locate; this cycle found it via the identical Wayback CDX search technique. All five confirmed genuine flat PDFs via pdfjs-dist getFieldObjects() returning null (no AcroForm) and getAnnotations() returning zero Widget-subtype annotations per page. This cycle also corrects a citation error found by independent re-extraction: the prior scouting note cited JAR-1 as approved by order 2016-01-06 No. V-4, but the fetched JAR-1's own printed header reads 'PATVIRTINTA ... 2020 m. balandžio 28 d. įsakymu Nr. VE-293(1.3E) (... 2024 m. gruodžio 20 d. įsakymo VE-828(1.3E) redakcija)' — approved 2020-04-28 by order No. VE-293(1.3E), as amended 2024-12-20 by order No. VE-828(1.3E). See VERIFICATION.md for the full per-form sourcing record, page-by-page field tally, and every disclosed scoping/judgment-call decision.

fields.name: legalForm
fields.label: Teisinė forma
fields.description: JAR-1's section 5 legal-form checkbox prints roughly 27 selectable legal forms (akcinė bendrovė, uždaroji akcinė bendrovė, individuali įmonė, and so on); this document models only the 'individuali įmonė' (sole proprietorship) selection, matching its own scope.

fields.name: registeredOfficeRealEstateRegisterNumber
fields.label: Buveinės unikalus Nr. Nekilnojamojo turto registre
fields.description: The registered office premises' unique number in the Real Estate Register, per the property's own NTR (Nekilnojamojo turto registras) extract.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 4, 'Buveinės unikalus Nr. Nekilnojamojo turto registre (pagal NTR išrašą)'

fields.name: financialYearStartDate
fields.label: Finansiniai metai — Pradžios data
fields.description: Month-day of the financial year's start, printed in Mėnuo-diena (MM-DD) format with no year component; left blank when the financial year coincides with the calendar year.

fields.name: financialYearEndDate
fields.label: Finansiniai metai — Pabaigos data
fields.description: Month-day of the financial year's end, printed in Mėnuo-diena (MM-DD) format with no year component.

fields.name: limitedActivityEndDate
fields.label: Veiklos laikotarpis, jeigu jis ribotas — Laikotarpio pabaiga
fields.description: End date of the entity's activity period, when the founding document limits its duration.

fields.name: limitedActivityOtherTerm
fields.label: Veiklos laikotarpis, jeigu jis ribotas — Kitaip steigimo dokumente nustatytas terminas
fields.description: Free-text description of an activity-period term set in the founding document in a form other than a fixed end date (e.g. tied to an event).
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 10.2, 'Kitaip steigimo dokumente nustatytas terminas'

fields.name: foundingDocumentDate
fields.label: Steigimo dokumentai — Steigimo dokumento sudarymo data
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 11.1, 'Steigimo dokumento sudarymo data (Metai - mėnuo - diena)'

fields.name: hasSoleManagementBody
fields.label: Juridinio asmens organai — Vienasmenis valdymo organas
fields.description: True (Taip) when the entity has a single-member management body; for an individuali įmonė this is always true, since JAR-VO-V (mandatory for this legal form per JAR-1 section 5) exists solely to record that body's data.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 12.1, 'Vienasmenis valdymo organas Taip - Ne'

fields.name: soleManagementBodyPositionTitle
fields.label: Juridinio asmens organai — Vienasmenio valdymo organo pavadinimas
fields.description: The single-member management body's own title/designation (e.g. 'savininkas', 'direktorius'), distinct from the office-holder's personal identity, which JAR-VO-V records separately.

fields.name: additionalAttachedDocuments
fields.label: Registro tvarkytojui teikiami dokumentai
fields.description: Free-form list, written in by the filer, of documents submitted to the register keeper beyond the standard companion forms — the form's own printed capacity is 7 numbered blank lines.

fields.name: jarVoVPageCount
fields.label: Formos, lapų skaičius — JAR-VO-V
fields.description: Number of JAR-VO-V pages physically attached to this filing, from JAR-1's own printed form/page-count grid.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 14, 'Formos, lapų skaičius' grid, 'JAR-VO-V' row

fields.name: jarSPageCount
fields.label: Formos, lapų skaičius — JAR-S
fields.description: Number of JAR-S pages physically attached to this filing, from JAR-1's own printed form/page-count grid.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 14, 'Formos, lapų skaičius' grid, 'JAR-S' row

fields.name: jarTPageCount
fields.label: Formos, lapų skaičius — JAR-T
fields.description: Number of JAR-T pages physically attached to this filing, from JAR-1's own printed form/page-count grid.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 14, 'Formos, lapų skaičius' grid, 'JAR-T' row

fields.name: kd1PageCount
fields.label: Formos, lapų skaičius — KD-1
fields.description: Number of KD-1 pages physically attached to this filing; KD-1 is not itself listed in JAR-1's section 14 grid (the grid enumerates JAR-series companion forms only) but is separately required by JAR-1 section 5's individuali įmonė instruction, so its own page count is modelled analogously.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 5, individuali įmonė companion-form list ('...JAR-T, KD-1')

fields.name: wantsVatPayerStatus
fields.label: Pageidavimas tapti PVM mokėtoju
fields.description: True (Taip) when the applicant, at the time of formation, also wishes to become a VAT payer. Printed 'Pildoma tik steigiamiems juridiniams asmenims' (completed only for entities being formed).
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 14 footer, 'Pageidavimas tapti PVM mokėtoju: Taip'

fields.name: vatPayerEffectiveDate
fields.label: Data, nuo kurios pageidaujama tapti PVM mokėtoju
fields.description: Date from which VAT-payer status is desired. The form's own footnote limits this to cases where the desired date does not coincide with the entity's registration date, so it is not machine-gated on wantsVatPayerStatus alone (an OR-style, form-internal condition this registry's shared Condition grammar cannot cleanly express without approximating field absence — see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 14 footer, 'Data, nuo kurios pageidaujama tapti PVM mokėtoju (Metai - mėnuo - diena)'

fields.name: filedViaNotary
fields.label: Prašymą ir prašyme nurodytus dokumentus Juridinių asmenų registro tvarkytojui perduoda notaras
fields.description: True (Taip) when a notary transmits this application and its documents to the register keeper on the filer's behalf; false (Ne) when the filer submits directly.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1, 'Prašymą ir prašyme nurodytus dokumentus Juridinių asmenų registro tvarkytojui perduoda notaras: Taip - Ne'

fields.name: filerPosition
fields.label: Prašymą užpildė — Pareigos
fields.description: The filer's position/capacity (e.g. when a representative rather than the owner personally completes the form); left blank when the owner files personally.

fields.name: formCompletionDate
fields.label: Užpildymo data
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 closing block, 'Užpildymo data (Metai - mėnuo - diena)'

fields.name: filerMobilePhone
fields.label: Kontaktiniai duomenys — Mobilusis tel.
fields.description: Printed 'Pildoma visais atvejais' (completed in all cases).

fields.name: filerEmail
fields.label: Kontaktiniai duomenys — El. paštas
fields.description: Printed 'Pildoma visais atvejais' (completed in all cases).

fields.name: filerCorrespondenceAddress
fields.label: Kontaktiniai duomenys — Adresas susirašinėjimui ir dokumentų persiuntimui
fields.description: Printed 'Pildoma visais atvejais' (completed in all cases).
fields.sourceRef: JAR-1 contact-details block, '3. Adresas susirašinėjimui ir dokumentų persiuntimui'

fields.name: ownerBirthDate
fields.label: Savininkas — Gimimo data
fields.description: Additionally given only when the owner is a foreign natural person ('Jei užsienio fizinis asmuo (nurodoma papildomai)'); this OR-style, form-internal condition is not machine-enforced (this registry's shared Condition grammar has no field-absence leaf operator, and gating on an optional field's absence via notEquals against an empty string is a known-bad approximation — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: ownerIdIssuingCountry
fields.label: Savininkas — Valstybės, kuri išdavė asmens dokumentą, pavadinimas
fields.description: Additionally given only when the owner is a foreign natural person; see ownerBirthDate's own note.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-S item 5, 'Valstybės, kuri išdavė asmens dokumentą, pavadinimas'

fields.name: ownerForeignCountryName
fields.label: Savininkas — Jei gyvenamoji vieta užsienyje — Valstybės pavadinimas
fields.description: Given instead of the domestic residence-address block when the owner's residence is abroad.

fields.name: ownerForeignAddress
fields.label: Savininkas — Jei gyvenamoji vieta užsienyje — Adresas
fields.description: Given instead of the domestic residence-address block when the owner's residence is abroad.

fields.name: managerBirthDate
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Gimimo data
fields.description: Additionally given only when the office holder is a foreign natural person; see ownerBirthDate's own note on this registry's treatment of OR-style form conditions.

fields.name: managerIdIssuingCountry
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Valstybės, kuri išdavė asmens dokumentą, pavadinimas
fields.description: Additionally given only when the office holder is a foreign natural person.
fields.sourceRef: JAR-VO-V item 5, 'Valstybės, kuri išdavė asmens dokumentą, pavadinimas'

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceMunicipality
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Savivaldybė

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceCity
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Miestas (kaimas)

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceStreet
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Gatvė

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceHouseNumber
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Namo Nr.

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceBuildingNumber
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Korpuso Nr.

fields.name: managerCorrespondenceRoomNumber
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Korespondencijos adresas — Buto Nr.

fields.name: managerForeignCountryName
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Jei korespondencijos adresas užsienyje — Valstybės pavadinimas
fields.description: Given instead of the domestic correspondence-address block when the office holder's correspondence address is abroad.

fields.name: managerForeignAddress
fields.label: Vienasmenis valdymo organas — Jei korespondencijos adresas užsienyje — Adresas
fields.description: Given instead of the domestic correspondence-address block when the office holder's correspondence address is abroad.

fields.name: managerAuthorityStartDate
fields.label: Įgaliojimų pradžios data
fields.description: Date from which the office holder begins holding office (appointment, election, or another date set by law, the entity's resolution, or contract).
fields.sourceRef: JAR-VO-V item 7, 'Įgaliojimų pradžios ... data (Metai - mėnuo - diena)'

fields.name: representationRule
fields.label: Taisyklė, pagal kurią asmenys veikia juridinio asmens vardu
fields.description: The rule by which persons act on the legal entity's behalf: sole representation (any one authorized person may act alone) or joint/quantitative representation (a specified number of authorized persons must act together).

fields.name: contactEntityCode
fields.label: Kontaktinė informacija — Kodas
fields.description: The entity's own Register of Legal Entities code; not yet assigned at the moment of an initial registration filing, so left blank in that case (the same treatment as JAR-1's own section-1 entity code, which is likewise printed for amendment filings).

fields.name: contactMobilePhone
fields.label: Kontaktinė informacija — Kontaktinis mobiliojo telefono numeris

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.label: Kontaktinė informacija — Elektroninio pašto adresas korespondencijai

fields.name: contactFilerPosition
fields.label: Pranešimą užpildė — Pareigos
fields.description: The filer's position/capacity; left blank when the owner files personally.

fields.name: contactFormCompletionDate
fields.label: Užpildymo data
fields.sourceRef: KD-1 closing block, 'Užpildymo data (Metai - mėnuo - diena)'

fields.name: dataProcessingConsent
fields.label: Sutikimas dėl asmens duomenų tvarkymo
fields.description: Optional consent to being contacted by Registrų centras at the given e-mail/phone for service-quality and efficiency purposes; the form itself prints this as an optional, revocable choice, not a condition of registration.
fields.sourceRef: KD-1, 'Sutinku, kad ... Registrų centras ... kreiptųsi į mane' / 'Nesutinku, kad Registrų centras ... kreiptųsi į mane'

documents.label: Steigimo dokumentas
documents.sourceRef: JAR-1 section 11.1 (the founding document whose execution date is entered there) and section 13's free-form attached-documents list, where the physical founding document is itemized.

documents.label: Sutikimas dėl asmens duomenų tvarkymo — Parašas
documents.sourceRef: KD-1, consent block closing signature line
